name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1-1/2 cups salad oil and 2 cups sugar. Beat until well mixed.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing well.
4. Mix in 2 cups finely grated carrots.
5. Pour batter into three greased and floured 8-inch layer cake pans.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 40 minutes.
7. Remove cakes from pans and cool on racks until completely cooled.
8. Fill cooled cakes with nut icing and frost.
NUT ICING
Combine: 1/2 cup butter or oleo, 1 (8-oz.) package cream cheese, and beat until light.
Gradually add, while beating: 1 (1 lb.) package confectioners sugar.
Add 1 tsp vanilla extract and 1 cup chopped walnuts. Mix well.
